def get_pdb_sequence(pdb_id):
    """Get protein sequence from PDB ID"""
    try:
        url = f"https://data.rcsb.org/rest/v1/core/polymer_entity/{pdb_id}/1"
        response = requests.get(url)
        data = response.json()
        return data['entity_poly']['pdbx_seq_one_letter_code_can']
    except:
        return None

def get_fpbase_proteins():
    """Get fluorescent protein data from FPbase"""
    try:
        # Try to get fluorescent proteins with spectral data
        url = "https://www.fpbase.org/api/proteins/"
        response = requests.get(url)
        if response.status_code == 200:

        else:
